title: Bayer Pink Dolls Stroller - Doll and Pram Set for 2 Year Old with Soft, Cuddly Baby Dolly 36 cm & Feeding Baby Doll Accessories - My First Foldable Dolls Pushchair, Toy Buggy for Girls, Toddler, Kids
features: Baby Doll and Pram Set: Take your dolly for delightful strolls with the double wheels for easy driving. This baby doll stroller glides effortlessly across surfaces, making every play journey a joy for your little one

Mealtime Magic: Watch your child's imagination soar with the integrated feeding baby buggy toy accessories set. The included buggy toys; plate, cup, bottle, fork and spoon make pretend mealtimes delightfully realistic and engaging

Safety First Design: Keep dolls snug and secure with the integrated toy pushchair safety belt. This dolls pram for 3 year olds girls gives young carers peace of mind, knowing their cherished friend is safely strapped in for every adventure

Compact & Space-saving Toy Stroller: The lightweight, foldable kids pushchair toy in a cute design with a 54 cm handle height makes this dolls buggy easy for children to carry and to store away when not in use
Includes Soft Baby Doll: Your little one will love cuddling and hugging this cute baby doll, a handy size (36 cm) for small hands to hold and carry, the ideal baby toy pram set for 2 year old plus

Perfect Gift A great my first pram set for kids ages 2 years old to 5 years; ideal boys and girls toys and pink dolls pram gift to inspire imaginative role play for birthdays, holidays, Christmas presents
description: From the manufacturer Bayer Design With our large range of lovely designed toys, children can realize great role plays or be creative! Bayer Design Doll pushchair set with doll ​Give your little one the joy of caring for their favourite dolls with this charming toy pushchair. For dolls up to 46cm, this delightful dolls pram features smooth-gliding wheels and an adjustable sun canopy to keep precious dolls shaded. A baby doll stroller with integrated safety belt and storage basket add realistic touches that young carers love. This foldable pushchair is super easy for little hands to fold and store, this toy buggy is ideal for both indoor play and outdoor adventures. Watch as your child's nurturing side blossoms with this beautifully designed dolls pushchair. Ideal girls birthday presents and gifts for little girls and boys. Includes baby dolls accessories; changing bag which can hang or store away in the basket. Doll pushchair set with doll Baby doll 36 cm With soft body ideal for cuddling Doll pushchair with double wheels Handle height: 54 cm Doll stroller suitable for 46 cm dolls With bottle, fork, spoon, plate
